prompt: This document is to be published on the UK GOV.UK government website. It may apply to one or more of the nations of the UK (England, Wales, Scotland or Northern Ireland). State whether it applies to scotland and give a short explanation (less than 100 words) for your decision.
reason: The document pertains specifically to changes in the NHS bowel cancer screening programme standards, which are governed by criteria set by the NHS in England. Scotland has its own distinct health system and regulations, and therefore, these changes do not apply to Scotland.
